hindi: बाँसुरी बजाते नंदलाल। ब्रज में रमते गोपाल॥
english: Nandlala plays the flute; Gopal roams in Braj
roman: Bansuri Bajate Nandlal, Braj Mein Ramate Gopal

hindi: जय यदुनंदन जय जगवंदन। जय वसुदेव देवकी नंदन॥
english: Victory to Yadunandana, praised by the world; victory to the son of Vasudeva and Devaki
roman: Jai Yadunandan Jai Jagvandan, Jai Vasudev Devaki Nandan

hindi: कंस विनाशन जगत उबारन। शिशु बाल रूप दिखाई॥
english: Destroyer of Kansa, saviour of the world; appearing in the form of a divine infant
roman: Kans Vinashan Jagat Ubaran, Shishu Bal Roop Dikhai

hindi: गोवर्धन गिरि धारण कीन्हो। इंद्र मान भंजन को लीन्हो॥
english: You lifted the Govardhan hill; and broke the pride of Indra
roman: Govardhan Giri Dharan Kinho, Indra Maan Bhanjan Ko Lino

hindi: श्रीमद् भागवत पुराण गाई। लीला तुम्हारी जग में छाई॥
english: The Srimad Bhagavat Purana sings your glory; your divine deeds pervade all the world
roman: Shrimad Bhagwat Puran Gai, Leela Tumhari Jag Mein Chhai

hindi: कृष्ण चालीसा भक्त जो गावे। कृष्ण कृपा से सब सुख पावे॥
english: Whoever sings the Krishna Chalisa; attains all happiness by Krishna's grace
roman: Krishna Chalisa Bhakt Jo Gaave, Krishna Kripa Se Sab Sukh Paave

hindi: जय श्री कृष्ण जगत के स्वामी। राधा मन के अंतर्यामी॥
english: Victory to Shri Krishna, lord of the world; knower of Radha's heart
roman: Jai Shri Krishna Jagat Ke Swami, Radha Man Ke Antaryami
